Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sean M. Gaffney, Esq., appeared on behalf of defendant and demurring party California Pacific Medical Center. Though opposing counsel was set up to appear by CourtCall there was no appearance.

Counsel represented that a First Amended Complaint will be filed. California Pacific Medical Center's demurrer to the original complaint was ordered off calendar. (JJM/KH) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
